requirement_topic.en: BEL Grid Connection — 110/220 V, 60 Hz Revalidation
requirement_topic.zh: BEL并网接入——110/220 V、60 Hz重新验证
requirement_topic.zht: BEL併網接入——110/220 V、60 Hz重新驗證

summary.en: Belize is a Central American / Caribbean electricity market served by Belize Electricity Limited (BEL) and regulated by the Public Utilities Commission (PUC). The practical supply environment is 110/220 V at 60 Hz, with US-heritage wiring and equipment expectations, and Belize also imports power from Mexico's CFE through the regional supply system. Grid-connected EV charger projects should be coordinated with BEL for service capacity, metering, protection, load management, transformer sizing, and commissioning. For China-made chargers, this is a fundamental electrical mismatch because China domestic equipment is commonly validated for 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase at 50 Hz.
summary.zh: 伯利兹属于中美洲 / 加勒比电力市场，由Belize Electricity Limited（BEL）供电，并受Public Utilities Commission（PUC）监管。实务供电环境为110/220 V、60 Hz，具有美国体系布线和设备预期，同时伯利兹还通过区域供电系统从墨西哥CFE进口电力。并网电动汽车充电桩项目应与BEL协调服务容量、计量、保护、负载管理、变压器容量和调试。对于中国制造充电桩，这是根本性电气不匹配，因为中国国内设备通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz验证。
summary.zht: 貝里斯屬於中美洲 / 加勒比電力市場，由Belize Electricity Limited（BEL）供電，並受Public Utilities Commission（PUC）監管。實務供電環境為110/220 V、60 Hz，具有美國體系佈線和設備預期，同時貝里斯還通過區域供電系統從墨西哥CFE進口電力。併網電動汽車充電樁項目應與BEL協調服務容量、計量、保護、負載管理、變壓器容量和調試。對於中國製造充電樁，這是根本性電氣不匹配，因為中國國內設備通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz驗證。

standards_or_laws: Belize Electricity Limited (BEL) service connection and project coordination requirements
Public Utilities Commission (PUC) electricity-sector regulatory oversight
Belize 110/220 V, 60 Hz utility supply practice
IEC 61000 series — power quality and electromagnetic compatibility reference

summary.en: China domestic charger installations are typically documented against GB/T 18487.1-2023, GB/T 20234 connectors, GB/T 27930-2023 communication for DC charging, and local grid-operator project acceptance. China's common supply baseline is 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz. That baseline does not match Belize's 110/220 V, 60 Hz environment, so input stage, transformer, rectifier, protection, EMC, thermal, and firmware behavior must be revalidated at 60 Hz and the applicable Belize voltage class.
summary.zh: 中国国内充电桩安装通常依据GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流充电GB/T 27930-2023通信，以及当地电网运营商项目验收准备文件。中国常见供电基线为220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。该基线与伯利兹110/220 V、60 Hz环境不匹配，因此输入级、变压器、整流器、保护、EMC、热设计和固件行为都必须在60 Hz及适用的伯利兹电压等级下重新验证。
summary.zht: 中國國內充電樁安裝通常依據GB/T 18487.1-2023、GB/T 20234接口、直流充電GB/T 27930-2023通訊，以及當地電網運營商項目驗收準備文件。中國常見供電基線為220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz。該基線與貝里斯110/220 V、60 Hz環境不匹配，因此輸入級、變壓器、整流器、保護、EMC、熱設計和固件行為都必須在60 Hz及適用的貝里斯電壓等級下重新驗證。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm: (1) the charger is rated and tested for 60 Hz; (2) AC input supports Belize 110/220 V class service as specified by the site; (3) transformer, rectifier, contactor, RCD/GFCI, surge protection, metering, and enclosure thermal design are valid for Belize supply; (4) EMC and harmonic evidence covers 60 Hz operation; (5) BEL receives service-capacity, load, protection, metering, and commissioning documentation before energization. A China domestic 220/380 V, 50 Hz design is not Belize grid-ready without engineering revalidation.
gap.zh: 出口商须确认：(1) 充电桩已按60 Hz额定并测试；(2) 交流输入支持伯利兹场地规定的110/220 V等级服务；(3) 变压器、整流器、接触器、RCD/GFCI、浪涌保护、计量和外壳热设计适用于伯利兹供电；(4) EMC和谐波证据覆盖60 Hz运行；(5) 在送电前向BEL提交服务容量、负载、保护、计量和调试文件。中国国内220/380 V、50 Hz设计未经工程重新验证，不能视为伯利兹并网就绪。
gap.zht: 出口商須確認：(1) 充電樁已按60 Hz額定並測試；(2) 交流輸入支持貝里斯場地規定的110/220 V等級服務；(3) 變壓器、整流器、接觸器、RCD/GFCI、浪湧保護、計量和外殼熱設計適用於貝里斯供電；(4) EMC和諧波證據覆蓋60 Hz運行；(5) 在送電前向BEL提交服務容量、負載、保護、計量和調試文件。中國國內220/380 V、50 Hz設計未經工程重新驗證，不能視為貝里斯併網就緒。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid-connected installations — BEL site coordination and PUC-regulated electricity service requirements apply; 60 Hz and 110/220 V compatibility must be confirmed for the actual service connection
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance applies domestically and is not a BEL approval substitute; 50 Hz / 220-380 V evidence is not sufficient for Belize

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Belize readiness starts with 60 Hz and 110/220 V validation. Treat China 220/380 V, 50 Hz grid evidence as a domestic baseline only; prepare BEL-facing service, protection, metering, EMC, and commissioning documentation for the specific site.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 伯利兹就绪性首先取决于60 Hz和110/220 V验证。应仅将中国220/380 V、50 Hz电网证据作为国内基线；针对具体场地准备面向BEL的服务容量、保护、计量、EMC和调试文件。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 貝里斯就緒性首先取決於60 Hz和110/220 V驗證。應僅將中國220/380 V、50 Hz電網證據作為國內基線；針對具體場地準備面向BEL的服務容量、保護、計量、EMC和調試文件。
